faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: You might find your answer on one of these pages:

hero.title: The Opportunity
hero.subtitle: Build a rewarding career in insurance with unlimited earning potential, comprehensive training, and a proven path to success.

incomeStreams.title: Multiple Income Streams
incomeStreams.subtitle: Our compensation plan rewards you for personal production and team building.

personalCommissions.title: Personal Commissions
personalCommissions.subtitle: Earn up to 90% on your personal sales
personalCommissions.description: Get paid directly when you help a family with their insurance needs. Higher ranks mean higher commission rates.

overrideIncome.title: Override Income
overrideIncome.subtitle: Earn on 6 generations of your team
overrideIncome.description: Build a team and earn override commissions on their production: 15%, 5%, 3%, 2%, 1%, and 0.5% on generations 1-6.

fastStartBonus.title: Fast Start Bonus
fastStartBonus.subtitle: Extra bonus on early production
fastStartBonus.description: Earn additional bonuses on your first 90 days of production. Hit targets and get rewarded for your quick start.

rankAdvancementBonus.title: Rank Advancement Bonus
rankAdvancementBonus.subtitle: Get paid when you promote
rankAdvancementBonus.description: Every time you advance in rank, you receive a one-time bonus. Higher ranks mean bigger advancement bonuses.

matchingBonus.title: Matching Bonus
matchingBonus.subtitle: Match your team's bonuses
matchingBonus.description: Earn a percentage match on bonuses earned by agents in your organization. Leadership has its rewards.

carBonus.title: Car Bonus
carBonus.subtitle: Monthly car allowance
carBonus.description: Qualify for our car bonus program and receive a monthly allowance toward your vehicle. Drive in style while building your business.

careerPath.title: Your Career Path
careerPath.subtitle: Clear advancement opportunities with increasing benefits at each level.
careerPath.additionalRanks: Plus 4 additional leadership ranks: Regional MGA, National MGA, Executive MGA, Premier MGA

training.title: Training & Support
training.subtitle: We don't just give you a contract and wish you luck. Our comprehensive training and support system ensures you have everything you need to succeed.

rightForYou.title: Is This Right for You?
rightForYou.subtitle: This opportunity is perfect for people who are:

licensed.q: Do I need to be licensed?
licensed.a: Yes, you need a life insurance license to sell. We will help you get licensed if you aren't already.

cost.q: Is there a cost to join?
cost.a: There is no cost to join Apex. You may have costs associated with getting licensed in your state.

pyramid.a: No. This is a legitimate insurance business. You earn commissions from selling insurance products, not from recruiting. Team building is optional and provides override income.

earnings.a: Your income depends on your effort. Some agents earn part-time income, others build six-figure businesses. There is no cap on earnings.

leads.a: We provide training on lead generation. Many agents work with their natural market initially and then learn to generate leads through various methods.

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.subtitle: Join {agentName}'s team today and start building your future in the insurance industry.

signup.subtitle: Start your journey with Apex Affinity Group and build a rewarding career in the insurance industry.

hero.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive suite of life insurance and annuity products from top-rated carriers to meet your clients' diverse needs.

iul.name: Indexed Universal Life (IUL)
iul.description: Permanent life insurance with cash value growth tied to market indexes.

term.name: Term Life Insurance
term.description: Affordable protection for a specific period of time.

annuities.name: Fixed Index Annuities
annuities.description: Retirement income products with principal protection and growth potential.

finalExpense.name: Final Expense Insurance
finalExpense.description: Whole life coverage designed to cover end-of-life costs.

carriers.title: Our Partner Carriers
carriers.subtitle: We work with A-rated insurance carriers to provide the best products and competitive commission rates for our agents.

commissions.title: Competitive Commissions
commissions.description: Earn up to 90% commission rates on life insurance and competitive rates on annuity products.

carriers.title: Trusted Carriers
carriers.description: All our carriers are A-rated or better, giving you confidence when presenting to clients.

process.title: Easy Application Process

cta.title: Ready to Learn More?
cta.subtitle: Contact {agentName} to learn more about our product portfolio.

hero.title: Success Stories
hero.subtitle: Hear from agents who have transformed their lives with Apex Affinity Group.

featured.quote: When I joined Apex, I had no idea it would completely change my life. Three years later, I've built a team of over 50 agents and achieved financial freedom. The systems, training, and support made all the difference.
featured.name: James Davis

michael.name: Michael Johnson
michael.quote: Joining Apex was the best decision I ever made. In just 2 years, I went from struggling in a corporate job to running my own successful insurance business. The training and support are unmatched.

sarah.name: Sarah Williams
sarah.quote: I was a stay-at-home mom looking for a way to contribute to my family's income. Apex gave me the flexibility to work on my own schedule while building a real career. I'm now earning more than I ever did in my previous career.

david.name: David Chen
david.quote: The compensation plan is incredible. I'm earning more from my overrides than I am from my personal production. Building a team has been the key to my success.

amanda.name: Amanda Rodriguez
amanda.quote: What I love most about Apex is the culture. Everyone is willing to help you succeed. My upline has been like a mentor to me, always available to answer questions and provide guidance.

robert.name: Robert Thompson
robert.quote: I've been in the insurance industry for 20 years, and I've never seen a better opportunity than Apex. The carrier contracts, the comp plan, the technology - it's all world-class.

jennifer.name: Jennifer Martinez
jennifer.quote: I was skeptical at first, but after seeing my first commission check, I was hooked. The products sell themselves when you believe in what you're offering.

stats.title: Real Results
stats.subtitle: Our agents are achieving incredible results. Here's what success looks like at Apex.

videos.title: Video Testimonials
videos.subtitle: Watch our agents share their stories in their own words.

cta.title: Write Your Success Story
cta.subtitle: Join {agentName} and the hundreds of agents who are building their dreams with Apex Affinity Group.

importantNotice.title: Important Legal Agreement
importantNotice.description: Please read these terms carefully before using our services or applying to become an independent agent. By using our website or services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

agreement.title: Agreement to Terms
agreement.content1: These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Apex Affinity Group ("Company," "we," "us," or "our") governing your use of our website, services, and agent opportunity.
agreement.content2: By accessing our website, submitting an application, or participating in our agent program, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms.

contractor.title: Independent Contractor Status
contractor.intro: You are an independent contractor, NOT an employee. This means:

items.control: You control your own hours, methods, and business practices
items.taxes: You are responsible for your own taxes, including self-employment tax
items.benefits: You are not entitled to employee benefits (health insurance, 401k, etc.)
items.licenses: You must obtain and maintain required insurance licenses at your own expense
items.represent: You may represent other companies, subject to carrier appointment rules
items.noGuarantee: We do not guarantee any minimum income or success

contractor.agreement: You agree to sign an Independent Contractor Agreement as part of your onboarding, which provides additional details about this relationship.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Requirements
eligibility.intro: To become an Apex Affinity Group agent, you must:

items.age: Be at least 18 years of age
items.authorized: Be legally authorized to work in the United States
items.background: Pass a background check (required by insurance carriers)
items.truthful: Provide accurate and truthful information on your application
items.noFelony: Have no felony convictions related to financial crimes

eligibility.reserve: We reserve the right to reject any application or terminate any agent relationship at our discretion.

compensation.title: Compensation and Commissions
compensation.intro: Your compensation is based solely on commissions from insurance products you sell and overrides from your team's production. Key terms include:

structure.title: Commission Structure
structure.description: Commission rates vary by product and your current rank level. See our Compensation Plan document for current rates.

chargebacks.title: Chargebacks
chargebacks.description: If a policy lapses or is cancelled within the chargeback period (typically 6-12 months depending on carrier), commissions may be recovered from future earnings or your account balance.

schedule.title: Payment Schedule
schedule.description: Commissions are paid according to our published payment schedule, typically weekly or bi-weekly, subject to carrier payment receipt.

minimum.title: Minimum Payout
minimum.description: A minimum balance may be required before payout. Amounts below the minimum will carry forward to the next pay period.

conduct.title: Code of Conduct
conduct.intro: As an Apex agent, you agree to:

items.honesty: Act with honesty and integrity in all business dealings
items.comply: Comply with all applicable laws, regulations, and carrier guidelines
items.noClaims: Never make misleading income claims or guarantees to prospects
items.accurate: Accurately represent products and their benefits
items.noRebating: Not engage in rebating, twisting, or other prohibited practices
items.noRecruit: Not recruit agents from other Apex teams without permission
items.professional: Maintain professional conduct on social media

conduct.violations: Violations may result in termination, commission forfeiture, and legal action.

voluntary.title: Voluntary Termination
voluntary.description: You may terminate your agent relationship at any time by providing written notice. Pending commissions will be paid according to normal schedule, subject to chargebacks.

cause.title: Termination for Cause
cause.intro: We may terminate your relationship immediately for:

items.violation: Violation of these Terms or Code of Conduct
items.production: Failure to meet minimum production requirements
items.reputation: Actions that harm the company's reputation

effect.title: Effect of Termination
effect.description: Upon termination, your access to our systems will be revoked, your replicated website will be deactivated, and you will no longer represent yourself as an Apex agent.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content1: All trademarks, logos, content, and materials on our website are owned by Apex Affinity Group or our licensors. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive license to use approved marketing materials during your active agent status.
ip.content2: You may not modify, reproduce, or distribute our materials without written permission. Your replicated website license is non-transferable and terminates when your agent status ends.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.intro: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW:

items.asIs: We provide services "as is" without warranties of any kind
items.noIndirect: We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
items.limited: Our total liability is limited to commissions actually paid to you in the preceding 12 months
items.thirdParty: We are not responsible for actions of insurance carriers or third parties

disputes.title: Dispute Resolution
disputes.content: Any disputes arising from these Terms or your agent relationship shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the American Arbitration Association rules. Arbitration will take place in the state where the Company is headquartered.
disputes.classAction: Class Action Waiver: You agree to resolve disputes individually and waive any right to participate in class action lawsuits.

modifications.title: Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or through our agent portal. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Texas, without regard to conflict of law principles.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.intro: Questions about these Terms? Contact us:
contact.mail: Mail: Apex Affinity Group, Attn: Legal Department

footer.acknowledgment: By using our services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood these Terms of Service and agree to be bound by them.
footer.incomeLink: For income-related disclosures, please review our

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content1: Apex Affinity Group ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website, use our services, or interact with our independent agents.
introduction.content2: Please read this privacy policy carefully. By using our services, you consent to the data practices described in this policy.

personal.title: Personal Information You Provide
personal.intro: When you register, apply, or contact us, we may collect:

items.address: Mailing address and date of birth
items.ssn: Social Security Number (for licensing and tax purposes)

automatic.title: Information Automatically Collected
automatic.intro: When you visit our website, we automatically collect:

items.pages: Pages visited and time spent on pages

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.intro: We use the information we collect to:

items.application: Process your agent application and onboarding
items.commissions: Calculate and pay commissions and bonuses
items.access: Provide access to our back-office systems
items.notices: Send important notices about your account
items.marketing: Communicate marketing and promotional offers (with consent)
items.legal: Comply with legal and regulatory requirements
items.improve: Improve our services and user experience

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.intro: We may share your information with:

carriers.title: Insurance Carriers
carriers.description: To facilitate licensing, appointments, and commission processing.

sponsor.title: Your Sponsor and Upline
sponsor.description: Limited information such as name, contact information, and production data to support mentorship and team management.

providers.title: Service Providers
providers.description: Third-party vendors who assist with payment processing, email services, data analytics, and technology infrastructure.

legal.title: Legal Requirements
legal.description: When required by law, court order, or regulatory authority.

sharing.noSell: We do NOT sell your personal information to third parties.

security.title: Data Security
security.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information, including:

items.encryption: Encryption of sensitive data in transit and at rest

security.disclaimer: While we strive to protect your information, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

access.title: Access and Portability
access.description: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you.

correction.title: Correction
correction.description: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information.

deletion.title: Deletion
deletion.description: Request deletion of your personal information, subject to legal retention requirements.

optOut.title: Opt-Out
optOut.description: Opt out of marketing communications at any time.

ccpa.title: California Residents (CCPA)
ccpa.description: California residents have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act, including the right to know what information is collected and the right to non-discrimination for exercising privacy rights.

rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@theapexway.net.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to:

items.analytics: Analyze website traffic and usage patterns

cookies.control: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect some website functionality.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices:
contact.mail: Mail: Apex Affinity Group, Attn: Privacy Officer

privacy.footer: This privacy policy applies to all visitors and users of Apex Affinity Group websites and services.

importantNotice.title: Important Notice
importantNotice.description: This income disclosure statement is required by the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) and is designed to provide you with accurate information about the earnings of Apex Affinity Group independent agents.

overview.title: Earnings Overview
overview.intro: The earnings of Apex Affinity Group independent agents vary significantly. The amount of money an agent earns depends on many factors, including but not limited to:

items.effort: Individual effort and time committed to the business
items.market: Market conditions in your geographic area

statistics.title: Income Statistics
statistics.intro: The following table shows the percentage of agents at each rank and their average annual earnings for the most recent fiscal year:
statistics.footnote: * These figures represent gross commissions before taxes and business expenses. Individual results will vary.

noGuarantee.title: No Guaranteed Income
noGuarantee.description: Apex Affinity Group does not guarantee any specific level of income or success. Your income depends entirely on your own efforts, skills, and dedication to building your business.

majority.title: Majority Earn Little or Nothing
majority.description: A significant majority of individuals who join the opportunity earn little to no income. Approximately 70% of agents earn less than $10,000 per year, and many earn nothing at all.

work.title: Income Requires Work
work.description: Income from Apex Affinity Group requires significant time, effort, and dedication. Success is not automatic and requires active engagement in sales, team building, and ongoing training.

expenses.title: Business Expenses
expenses.description: All agents are responsible for their own business expenses, including licensing fees, continuing education, marketing costs, and technology expenses. These costs reduce your net income.

licensing.title: Licensing Requirements
licensing.description: To sell insurance products, you must obtain and maintain appropriate state licenses. Licensing requirements, costs, and time vary by state. You cannot earn commissions until you are properly licensed.

commission.title: Commission Structure
commission.description: Commissions are paid based on actual insurance product sales. Override commissions are paid on the production of agents in your downline. Commission rates vary by product and rank level.

legal.title: Legal Statement
legal.content1: This income disclosure statement is provided in compliance with FTC guidelines for business opportunity disclosures. The income figures presented represent actual results from the most recent complete fiscal year.
legal.content2: Apex Affinity Group is not a "get rich quick" scheme. Building a successful insurance agency requires substantial time, effort, skill development, and persistence. Many people who join do not make any money, and some may lose money due to business expenses.
legal.content3: Before making any decision to join, you should carefully review this income disclosure, speak with your financial advisor, and consider whether this opportunity is appropriate for your personal and financial situation.
